title: Courses

emptyState.title: Generate all your schedule options
emptyState.description: Add your courses with their groups and schedules, and generate all possible conflict-free combinations.

form.title: Course Information
form.description: Enter the course information to include it in your plan

groupFormDes: Enter the group information to include it in the course
noActiveDays: Select a day to add times
courseFormDes: Enter the course information to include it in your schedule

validation.mustAddACourse: You must add a course first
validation.mustHaveActiveCourses: You must have at least one active course
validation.mustHaveActiveGroups: You must have at least one active group in some course

clearAll.title: Are you sure?
clearAll.description: This action cannot be undone. All courses will be removed from the list.

deleteItem.title: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
deleteItem.description: This action cannot be undone. "{{itemName}}" will be removed.

deleteCourse.title: Are you sure you want to delete this course?
deleteCourse.description: This action cannot be undone. The course "{{itemName}}" will be removed from the list.
deleteCourse.descriptionWithLink: This action cannot be undone. The course "{{itemName}}" will be removed along with its links.

deleteGroup.title: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
deleteGroup.description: This action cannot be undone. The group "{{itemName}}" will be removed from the course.
deleteGroup.descriptionWithLink: This action cannot be undone. The group "{{itemName}}" will be removed along with its links.

linking.manageLinkDescription: View and manage course links. Linked courses share group constraints.
linking.emptyStateDescription: Links indicate which groups from different courses should be taken together. Useful for labs, practicals, or related courses.
linking.linkDescription: Linked courses share group constraints. The generator will only create schedules with connected groups.
linking.step2Description: Select one group from each course and add them as a connection. Only connected groups will be considered during generation.
linking.noCoursesToLink: Add at least 2 courses to create a link
linking.conflictingConnectionsRemoved: Connections with schedule conflicts were removed
linking.orphanGroupsNote: Note: Groups without connections will not be considered in schedule generation.
